creator: tenser@spitfire.ecsel.psu.edu
text:
I uploaded a port of Dan Bernstein's Qmail mailer to
	ftp.freebsd.org, /pub/FreeBSD/incoming/qmail-port.tar.gz.
	It's late, but I think that everything in it is work-
	ing correctly.  :-)  (Note- there's also a qmail.tar.gz
	that I uploaded into the same directory.  That file has
	a typo in it, [argh] and ftpd obviously won't let me
	overwrite it.  :-)
